description_long: This is a modern two-story house situated on a landscaped plot with a mix of green lawn, paved driveway, and scattered trees. The house features a flat roof with multiple levels, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a combination of wood, concrete, and glass materials on the exterior. The front of the house is defined by a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch, flanked by minimalist landscaping and a driveway. The rear and sides of the house reveal additional terraces and balconies, providing outdoor living spaces. The property is bordered by a low fence and includes both deciduous and evergreen trees, enhancing its contemporary suburban appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, wood and concrete finishes, set on a landscaped lot with trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, driveway, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back terrace, balconies, and a more private garden area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the driveway, garage entrance, and the transition between paved and grassy areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the flat roof structure, rear balconies, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, a covered porch, minimalist columns, and a modern door
